name: MARY DEATON
motto: "Oh come here, I have something to tell you."

name: LUCILE STANLEY MITCHELL
motto: "And I nearly fell off the Christmas tree."

name: GLADYS E. SHORT
motto: "It isn't so much what you do, as the way you do it, that counts."

name: LOLA M. SNIDER
motto: "I've got a life-size picture of it."

name: ANNIE L. TREADWELL
motto: "No, girls, I must study. Shirk no duty for pleasure."

name: AMANDA C. WAINWRIGHT
motto: "Oh, land, if I was through the College, then I could teach."

name: Sallie Redd Isbell Stuart
description: IN MEMORIAM of our classmate and friend, Died May 18, 1912.

name: Merchant, Margaret
description: The great musician was answering the third curtain. This did not surprise me, for we had all expected something from the music of Margaret Merchant.

name: Short, Gladys
description: Gladys Short had given her life to cultivating flowers to gladden the poor and sick.

name: L. S. M.
description: Author of the class prophecy.

name: Edward Conradi
description: Every College has its Boosters; so has the Florida State College for Women. The present Junior Class is not only the largest Junior Class in the history of the College, but it has always been a boosting Class. Here is to the Juniors.

name: N. M. Salley
description: My opinion of the Juniors? Draw nigh. Let us speak low; for they are the ears of all the ages. Tell it not in Gath. "Vanity of vanities, all is vanity," saith the teacher.

name: Wm. G. Dodd
description: When the Junior Class entered college as Freshmen, it was clear to everybody that if they were to be among the saved at the great judgment four years hence, it must be so by fire. Since that time, the process of purification by fire has gone on. Where so much of dross was to be consumed, much burning was necessary. "Burnt child dreads the fire," so it is said, and repeated scorchings and roastings have made these Juniors timid, (?)—even to the point of feeling at times that they know less than they really do! But much is yet to be done, and there remains only a year in which to do it. Will the fire be equal to its task? In June, 1914, shall we be able to point to our Seniors and say to a waiting world, "After four years of purging and purifying, this that we present you is gold,—pure, refined, 24-carat gold?" Let us hope.

name: Ruby Adams
description: Hobby: Hats. Favorite Pastime: Selecting hats. Characteristic Expression: "Ye gods, for a hat like this!" Her Gift: Chuckling. Aspiration: To get her "dip".

name: Emma Barrs
description: Hobby: Basket-ball. Favorite Pastime: Reading "The Post". Characteristic Expression: "Have you read the last installment of-?" Her Gift: Prominent teeth. Aspiration: To answer Dr. Dodd's questions.

name: Constance Bishop
description: Hobby: Boys. Favorite Pastime: "Turkey Trotting". Characteristic Expression: "My name's Bishop". Her Gift: Harping on P K A. Aspiration: To wear five (5) "frat" pins.

name: Clara Brown
description: Hobby: German. Favorite Pastime: Going to town. Characteristic Expression: "Oh, Shucks!" Her Gift: Getting candy. Aspiration: To plan a house.

name: Anselena Burton
description: Hobby: Chemistry. Favorite Pastime: Singing. Characteristic Expression: "Dandy!" Her Gift: Golden tresses. Aspiration: Not to live alone.

name: Laura Chapman
description: Hobby: Cooking. Characteristic Expression: "We didn't do that way at Stetson." Her Gift: Getting peeved. Aspiration: To find a man's heart through his stomach.

name: Pearl Caldwell
description: Hobby: Woman's suffrage. Favorite Pastime: Arguing. Characteristic Expression: "Vote for women!" Her Gift: Eloquence. Aspiration: To be mayor of Jasper.

name: Maude Godby
description: Hobby: English. Favorite Pastime: Staring into space. Characteristic Expression: "I don't know." Her Gift: Neatness. Aspiration: To write one good theme before death.

name: Elon Guice
description: Hobby: Studying. Favorite Pastime: Practising. Characteristic Expression: "Did I get any mail?" Her Gift: Talking fast. Aspiration: To hear from Kissimmee.

name: Naomi Grothaus
description: Hobby: Sewing. Favorite Pastime: Outstripping H. E. I. Characteristic Expression: "Well-er". Her Gift: Hair dressing. Aspiration: To stand first.

name: Mildred Hanford
description: Hobby: Studying. Favorite Pastime: Still studying. Characteristic Expression: "Excuse me." Her Gift: A grin. Aspiration: To know it all.

name: Hazel Hough
description: Hobby: "Cramming". Favorite Pastime: Loafing. Characteristic Expression: "Oh, Pete!" Her Gift: Beaming countenance. Aspiration: To elope.

name: Ruth Harper
description: Hobby: Talking. Favorite Pastime: Still talking. Characteristic Expression: "It isn't that way, it's like this-". Her Gift: That of "Gab". Aspiration: To boss the world.

name: Lillian Higgins
description: Hobby: Looking pretty. Favorite Pastime: Posing. Characteristic Expression: "Gollie!" Her Gift: Acting babyish. Aspiration: To get married.

name: Edna Ireland
description: Hobby: Everything. Favorite Pastime: Doing others' problems. Characteristic Expression: "Ain't it cute?" Her Gift: Spitting out answers. Aspiration: To make an A average.

name: Phyllis Jarrell
description: Hobby: Violin. Favorite Pastime: Jabbering. Characteristic Expression: "Well, now I think!". Her Gift: Looking wise. Aspiration: To be a second Miss Rausch.

name: Maude Johnson
description: Hobby: Making "Divinity". Favorite Pastime: Cleaning house. Characteristic Expression: "Ge-rusa-lem!". Her Gift: Being "Just so". Aspiration: To make a good housewife.

name: Irma Blake
description: Hobby: Music. Favorite Pastime: Talking. Characteristic Expression: "You beautiful child!". Her Gift: Walking gracefully. Aspiration: To reduce her hips.

name: Jessie Key
description: Hobby: Writing checks on mother. Favorite Pastime: Lending her clothes. Characteristic Expression: "Oh-Dang it!". Her Gift: Being silly. Aspiration: To make a talk in English without weeping.

name: Helen Martin
description: Hobby: Domestic Science. Favorite Pastime: Cooking. Her Gift: "Stickability". Aspiration: To do things scientifically.

name: Zoe Manning
description: Hobby: None. Favorite Pastime: Going to church. Her Gift: Sweet voice. Aspiration: To agree with everyone.

name: Myrtice McCaskill
description: Hobby: Math. Favorite Pastime: Dining in town. Her Gift: Getting "invites". Aspiration: To act masculine.

name: Myra McIlvaine
description: Hobby: Voice. Favorite Pastime: "Screeching". Her Gift: Doing household affairs. Aspiration: To be a good cook.

name: Rubie B. McLin
description: Hobby: Expression. Favorite Pastime: Reading Cosmopolitan. Her Gift: Being prissy. Aspiration: To do what she wants to, when she wants to.

name: Georgia Pattishall
description: Hobby: Music. Favorite Pastime: Tennis. Her Gift: Losing "love-sets". Aspiration: To be a musician.

name: Bertie Patterson
description: Hobby: Domestic Science. Favorite Pastime: Reading. Her Gift: Spending nights in town. Aspiration: To marry a man like "Brother Guyte".

name: Eloise Slappey
description: Hobby: Embroidering. Favorite Pastime: Gossiping. Her Gift: Having "dates" with Frank. Aspiration: To have nothing to do.

name: Katherine Smith
description: Hobby: French. Favorite Pastime: Sunday School books. Her Gift: A grin. Aspiration: To be a trained nurse.

name: Irma Trammel
description: Hobby: Dancing. Favorite Pastime: Missing breakfast. Her Gift: Beautiful figure. Aspiration: To be a good dancer.

name: Fannie Treadwell
description: Hobby: Gym. Favorite Pastime: Primping. Her Gift: Making eyes. Aspiration: To be a "gym" dancer.

name: Bessie Van Brunt
description: Hobby: Latin. Favorite Pastime: Singing. Her Gift: Modesty. Aspiration: To be like "Sister".

name: Winnie Warren
description: Hobby: Sleeping. Favorite Pastime: Sleeping some more. Her Gift: Amiable disposition. Aspiration: Absolutely nothing.

name: Maidie Wilkison
description: Hobby: Fussing. Favorite Pastime: Powdering her face. Her Gift: White face. Aspiration: To write a theme that will please Dr. Dodd.

name: Elvia Wuthrich
description: Hobby: Studying. Favorite Pastime: Going to mail call. Her Gift: Pronouncing French. Aspiration: To make good marks.

name: Rosa Walker
description: Hobby: Books. Favorite Pastime: Writing letters. Her Gift: Neatness. Aspiration: To be an architect.

name: Iris Watson
description: Hobby: Voice. Favorite Pastime: Sitting down. Her Gift: Graceful carriage. Aspiration: Not to be an old maid.

name: Blanche Warren
description: Hobby: Dancing. Favorite Pastime: Snake dance. Her Gift: Catching beaux. Aspiration: To skin through.

name: Shirley von Wachenhusen
description: Hobby: Swimming. Favorite Pastime: Doing the "dip". Her Gift: Knowing it all. Aspiration: To go back to Silver City.

name: Conradi, Dr.
description: Is a gentleman, learned and hardy. He governs with knowledge This most "precious" college— And never is known to be tardy.

name: Salley, Dean
description: Presides without pity. Restrictions no few, Imposes on you— Till your poor brain is hopelessly giddy.

name: Dodd, Dr.
description: A most talented man— None can sing—none can play like he can. In his dreams he's a poet, But you'd never know it— He's so timid, retiring, and bland.

name: "Pie", Mr.
description: Whose sweet nature none can deny. Offense do not take, Should he fail to awake When in class you would give your reply.

name: Smith
description: Yet Smith is all right, Exceedingly bright— But beware of provoking his wrath!

name: McNeill
description: A learned one with whom I must deal, "Ahem!" I would say, To quote, if I may, For there's not room about him to "spiel."

name: Boyd
description: A teacher from South Carolina, Than he, there is surely none finer. Dr. Boyd is his name, And so great is his fame, His "digressions" we think of as minor.

name: Barber
description: There lives, too, a teacher named Barber, Who searches all day in the arbor, In case he may find Some bug or some vine, Which down in his "lab" he can harbor.

name: Garnand
description: Mr. Garnand, in this famous land, Over history and French does command. He's gentle and kind— The best you can find. And is skillful in teaching his "band."

name: John G.
description: There's a man who resides in this city, Who is famous because he is witty. "John G." with his car Does ride near and far— And this is the end of my ditty.

name: Iva Marjorie Leach
description: Author of the class poem "The Senior Normal Class".

name: Helen Hobbs
description: Honorary Member.

name: Steele Edmunds Smith
description: Honorary Member.

name: INGA OLLA HELSETH
motto: "Wearing all that weight of learning lightly like a flower."

name: IVA MARJORIE LEACH
motto: "I am resolved to grow fat and look young until forty, and then slip out of the world with the first wrinkle and the reputation of five and twenty."

name: PEARL ERIN DUKE
motto: "For if she will, she will, You may depend on't; And if she won't, she won't; So there's an end on't."

name: VICTORIA COLEMAN
motto: "Or light or dark, or short or tall, She sets a springe to snare them all. All's one to her—above the fan She'd make sweet eyes at ——."

name: ELIZABETH BARBARA MUSSON
motto: "As merry as the day is long."

name: CONSTANCE HENRIETTA BOURLAY
motto: "A rosebud set with little wilful thorns, And sweet as Southern air could make her, she."

name: Leila Aikens
motto: Every Great Thing Has a Small Beginning

name: Bertha Andrews
motto: Every Great Thing Has a Small Beginning

motto: Every Great Thing Has a Small Beginning

name: Eddy, Bessie
motto: "We would look up and laugh and love and lift."

name: Maxwell, Mabel
motto: "We would look up and laugh and love and lift."

motto: "We would look up and laugh and love and lift."

motto: "We would look up and laugh and love and lift."

motto: "We would look up and laugh and love and lift."

name: Helen Carter
major: Dietetics, Florida State College for Women
description: One of ten energetic, comely women in the Dietetics Class of the Florida State College for Women. The class consists of Seniors and Post Graduates who believe in themselves, in humanity and in the success of their undertakings.

major: Dietetics, Florida State College for Women
